programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In California, police face off against a knife-wielding bodybuilder; a wanted criminal draws an officer into a brawl in a sex shop; a fleeing suspect drives a car directly at officers to escape.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer in Georgia won't go down without a fight; police in Ohio fear for their lives when faced with an ambush from a hidden gunman; after a high-speed chase, a fleeing driver has one more surprise for Macomb County Deputies.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: Police go into an ambush as they try to rescue an injured pregnant woman.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: An SUV crashes into a house, setting off an explosion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: A churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing; then Kenda investigates the mysterious death of a successful dentist, and the case gets personal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda looks for answers in the death of Calvin Blair, a young man stabbed and left for dead on the roadside; after Alexandra Drake is shot in the face, she manages to tell police it was an accident, but Kenda isn't so sure he believes her.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly after two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head; while the witnesses are unable to provide any solid leads, Lt. Joe Kenda digs into Davis' past and starts to suspect someone in William's circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit search for two escaped inmates in Colorado Springs, Colo.; police break up a domestic dispute and find a body in the bedroom.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: After someone executes a charismatic New Hampshire businessman in his sleep, the case goes ice-cold; detective Robert Freitas uses his wits and a wiretap to outsmart a deceitful associate who believed he'd long since gotten away with murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective
programme.desc: This true-crime series hosted by Lt. Joe Kenda, one of America's toughest detectives, features incredibly disturbing and mind-blowing cases from across the country. Lt. Kenda expertly guides us through the complex twists and turns of these bizarre crimes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Recreational hunters find the body of a female naval veteran in a rural campground, leaving police to answer challenging questions. How had the victim gotten there? Why was she drugged, and who wanted her dead?

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Can police use a blurry image taken just seconds before a California woman's disappearance to find the man responsible for her gruesome murder?

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: A teenage girl has been missing for a month before she is found murdered in tranquil La Porte, Ind.; dogged investigators spend 15 years searching for the victim's killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: A fun-loving New Jersey woman buys a home close to her family, then the wrong houseguest proves deadly, and police must dig through the victim's life to find an enemy who hides very close.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including 20 Emmys and three Peabody Awards.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.sub-title: The Life and Death of Blaze Bernstein
programme.desc: The murder of Ivy League student Blaze Bernstein, allegedly murdered because he was gay and Jewish; the trial of former high school classmate Sam Woodward.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID
programme.sub-title: The Plot to Eliminate Alyssa Burkett
programme.desc: After the horrific murder of a Texas woman, investigators discover that finding a suspect is only part of this complex story; Peter Van Sant reports.

programme.title: Murder Calls
programme.desc: Calling 911, a woman whispers that intruders broke into her home, bound her and her son and attacked her husband; police arrive to find the husband dead and the killers gone; investigators struggle to expose the twisted mastermind behind the crime.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder Calls
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 when she finds her husband shot to death; the investigation reveals allegations of harassment from the victim's ex-lover and eventually uncovers a complex trail of deceit, in a murder that was years in the making.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder Calls
programme.desc: With the help of a neighbor, an injured woman calls 911 saying an intruder broke into her boyfriend's home and shot them both; police respond to find the boyfriend executed; they must decipher strange evidence left behind to identify the killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: New Mexico State Police are called in to investigate when loving couple Gary and Linda Haas fail to reach their vacation campsite; with no forensic evidence and no witnesses, all they can do is scour CCTV footage for clues to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: A quiet town is shaken to its core when an innocent woman is gunned down in broad daylight; detectives desperately act to find her killer and restore the peace.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: An 18-year-old named Kyle Farishian is brutally attacked by a masked assailant; with no physical evidence, detectives scrutinize the store's footage for clues.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: The brutal murder of an elderly landlady offers no forensic answers.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: When a young mother plummets into depression, she turns to the internet for comfort, discovering a virtual world of fetishes, fantasies and dark intentions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in a backyard, police have little to go on; the homeowner has recently disappeared, and all that he has left behind are clues posted online; police wonder if they will lead to the identity of the victim -- or the killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: When high school boys are harassed online by a new girl in a California town, secrets unfold that tear the community apart; one mother has heard it all before and won't stop until justice is finally served.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: A college student seeks solace online when the pressures of life begin to mount; when she meets a young nurse in a chat room going through similar troubles, the pair strike up an unbreakable bond, but she may have placed her trust in the wrong hands.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: When neighbors find a young teacher axed to death on Friday the 13th, a sleepy suburb fears a psychopath is loose; the bloody crime scene leads police to a most unlikely suspect, unfolding a story people still have to see to believe 40 years later.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hollywood Demons
programme.desc: Former child actors Brian Bonsall and Dee Jay Daniels unpack the harsh reality of life after fame, while producers from "Home Improvement" and "That's So Raven" reveal their brush with young stars who ended up behind bars.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: A missing person's report sends investigators on a desperate search through the seedy underbelly of the Floribama panhandle; all roads lead to a once sought-after porn star, whose fate is revealed when an informant comes forward to unearth the truth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hollywood Demons
programme.desc: Former child actors Brian Bonsall and Dee Jay Daniels unpack the harsh reality of life after fame, while producers from "Home Improvement" and "That's So Raven" reveal their brush with young stars who ended up behind bars.

programme.title: Home Alone
programme.desc: Seventeen-year old Katie lives with her doting parents, who are shocked to find out she's being stalked by an ex-boyfriend they didn't know existed; one night, Katie's parents reluctantly agree to leave her home alone with appalling consequences.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Alone
programme.desc: In Alabama, teenager Haley craves her independence, but her protective mother, Teresa, worries about the company she's keeping; Teresa convinces Haley to end a toxic relationship with a young man, but he won't let go until he gets what he wants.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Home Alone
programme.desc: Valerie and her adopted son, Nathan, start a new chapter of their lives in Nebraska, then a knock at the door one night brings back demons from the past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: If I Should Die
programme.desc: Family members are shocked to learn that Patricia Kimble was shot before her body was consumed in a deliberately set house fire; investigators scour her diary for clues as to who would want to kill the devout Christian newlywed.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: If I Should Die
programme.desc: Conrad and Ricky Morales are happily living with their uncle and his wife in Washington State, but when Conrad goes missing, and Ricky later dies under suspicious circumstances, it falls to Conrad's diary to explain the truth about the family.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: If I Should Die
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Candice Parchment goes missing from her Georgia home and is found murdered months later; the investigation hits a dead end until the discovery of Candice's diary reveals a shocking assault and points to the person who killed her.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Hometown Homicide
programme.desc: Forty-year-old Rachael Anderson disappears without a trace after calling a friend about a home improvement project she'll never complete.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hometown Homicide
programme.desc: College student Jessica O'Grady vanishes one night, making locals wonder if she is kidnapped; especially since another woman disappeared a week earlier.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hometown Homicide
programme.desc: Roger Kemp finds the body of his murdered 19-year-old daughter, Ali, at the neighborhood pool where she worked; Kemp embarks on a quest to find his daughter's killer using billboards.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hometown Homicide
programme.desc: Joel Larson is shot to death in a safe haven community for gay people in 1990s Minneapolis; two more shootings terrorize people in the community as they realize a serial killer lives among them.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Locals stay quiet to protect their own when a new resident of Hartford, Ky., is found tied up and floating in a toolbox in a creek.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
